subcodes.title: Words to Alma Albertson et al, spoken on 1900-11-26
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! You have attained the visit of the Holy Tomb... The worldly grades of every Manifestation are so different
subcodes.subjects: @the cross and the trinity, @identity; relationship of Manifestation of God to God, @sacrifice of the Manifestation of God redeems the world, @Manifestation of God as mirror, @Manifestation of God does not act of own volition
